use_cases: Loading state indicator for media streaming interfaces
Recording session status display for video or audio applications
Processing feedback for SaaS dashboards and content platforms
ai_summary: A looping loader component featuring an animated recording indicator with a red blinking dot and 'REC' text alongside a laptop icon. The animation uses a horizontal sweep effect with clip-path transitions, creating a recording-in-progress visual metaphor. Built with styled-components using CSS keyframe animations in a clean, flat orange color scheme.
